classification.reasoning: The patch introduces two new pipeline functions (RemoveSingleField and RemoveMultipleFields) and modifies an existing function (RemoveField) to deprecate it and change its behavior. It adds new Java classes and updates existing ones, including changes to parameter types and method implementations. The patch also updates test cases and adds new test resources. The localization evidence shows that some hunks are exact matches, but others require pickaxe or embedding methods, indicating structural changes. Overall, the patch involves structural additions and modifications but not deep refactoring or redesign, fitting the TYPE_III classification.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added imports for two new message processing functions: RemoveMultipleFields and RemoveSingleField.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To include the new field removal functions in the module for registration and use.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Registered two new message processor functions, RemoveSingleField and RemoveMultipleFields, alongside existing functions.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: ProcessorFunctionsModule.java, inside method registering message processor functions
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable the new field removal functions to be available for pipeline processing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of java.util.regex.Pattern to support regex operations in RemoveField.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable use of regex Pattern for matching field names in the RemoveField function.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the field parameter type from String to compiled Pattern and updated evaluation logic to use regex matching instead of String.matches.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: RemoveField class, constructor and evaluate method
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve performance and correctness by compiling the regex pattern once and using it for matching field names during removal.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated function descriptor to mark RemoveField as deprecated and recommend using remove_single_field or remove_multiple_fields instead.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To inform users that RemoveField is deprecated and guide them to use more performant alternatives.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new function RemoveMultipleFields that removes multiple fields from a message either by regex pattern or by a list of field names.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: RemoveMultipleFields class, including constructor, evaluate method, and helper methods removeRegex and removeNames
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a performant and flexible way to remove multiple fields from a message in pipeline processing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new function RemoveSingleField that removes a single specified field from a message.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: RemoveSingleField class, including constructor and evaluate method
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a simple and efficient function to remove a single field from a message in pipeline processing.

.name(NAME)
                .returnType(Void.class)
                .params(ImmutableList.of(fieldParam, messageParam, invertParam))
                .description("Removes the named field from message, unless the field is reserved. If no specific message is provided, it removes the field from the currently processed message.")
                .ruleBuilderEnabled()
                .ruleBuilderName("Remove field")
                .ruleBuilderTitle("Remove field '${field}'")
                .ruleBuilderFunctionGroup(RuleBuilderFunctionGroup.MESSAGE)
                .build();
failed_hunks.new_content:
.name(NAME)
                .returnType(Void.class)

                .ruleBuilderEnabled()
